metadata.journal_name: Wake Forest Journal of Business and Intellectual Property Law
metadata.status_reason: ipjournal.law.wfu.edu 301-redirects to jbipl.pubpub.org which is fronted by Cloudflare WAF (returns 403 Attention Required to non-browser UAs). PubPub also requires JS rendering for article discovery; no current adapter for pubpub.org and the WAF blocks Generic crawl. Needs site-specific PubPub adapter or Playwright fallback.
metadata.status_evidence_ref: curl -A Mozilla jbipl.pubpub.org -> 403 Cloudflare; ipjournal.law.wfu.edu -> 301 to jbipl.pubpub.org
